architecture_summary: Split the config UI axum router at config_server.rs:35 so /api/* routes sit on a dedicated sub-router with in-memory global RateLimitState middleware (60 req/min, not per-IP), while static fallback stays unlimited. Enable axum macros feature in Cargo.toml:12 for middleware wiring — no new crates.

pipeline.goal: New middleware module; config_server.rs:35 currently has no rate limiting on the Router.
Declare config_rate_limit module; lib.rs:1 lists pub mod agent without config_rate_limit.
